subject: fix(icons): add geometricPrecision to SVG, remove orphaned favicon-48
body:
shape-rendering="geometricPrecision" on icon.svg tells the rasterizer
to prioritize accurate geometry for all icons (per glow-props APP_ICONS
pattern). Removed orphaned favicon-48x48.png that was generated but
never referenced by manifest, HTML, or includeAssets. Removed duplicate
shape-rendering injection from maskable transform (source SVG now has it).
Build verified.

Tags: icons, pwa, cleanup, glow-props-sync
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: glow-props-sync
Semver: patch
